title: bromus pratensis var. simplex
intro: Bromus pratensis var. simplex, also known as meadow brome, is a grass species native to Europe and western Asia, characterized by its tall, slender stems and feathery panicles. The medicinal properties of meadow brome include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of meadow brome include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for bronchitis and coughs. Meadow brome can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
